findings.title: Minimal Mistakes masthead does NOT support children dropdown (ROOT CAUSE)
findings.impact: Trading link rendered as href='' (does nothing), Live Trading invisible. ROOT CAUSE of reported bug. Already fixed in commit 7a36784.

findings.title: Broken navigation deployed to production without validation
findings.impact: No CI or local preview caught the broken nav config before push to main.

findings.title: Chart.js CDN failure silently breaks charts on trading.html
findings.impact: Charts render as empty boxes if CDN blocked. No error message.

findings.title: Chart.js CDN failure + render() no error boundary on live-trading.html
findings.impact: CDN failure causes unhandled promise rejection. Data tables render but chart dies. Future remote data migration will silently produce empty dashboard.

findings.title: CDN scripts loaded without Subresource Integrity (SRI)
findings.impact: CDN compromise could inject arbitrary JS.

findings.title: innerHTML with future external data source, no sanitization
findings.impact: Currently safe (inline data). XSS risk after migration to external JSON.

findings.title: Gemfile.lock excluded from version control
findings.impact: Non-reproducible builds from unpinned dependencies.

findings.title: Greedy navigation hides Trading items on medium viewports
findings.impact: 6 nav items push Trading/Live Trading to hamburger on 768-1100px viewports.

findings.title: No cross-link between Trading and Live Trading pages
findings.impact: Users on one page have no way to discover the other except via top nav.

findings.title: No guard against navigation regression
findings.impact: No comments or CI prevent using children syntax again.

findings.title: Synchronous Chart.js (201KB) blocks page rendering
findings.impact: Empty skeleton for 1+ seconds on slow connections.

findings.title: Google Fonts render-blocking in head
findings.impact: Delayed First Contentful Paint on all pages.

findings.title: Duplicate Chart.js load without prefetch
findings.impact: First visit to trading pages requires full 201KB download.

findings.title: Google Fonts loaded without SRI
findings.impact: Theoretical supply chain risk. SRI impractical for Google Fonts.

findings.title: No Content Security Policy headers
findings.impact: No defense-in-depth against XSS.

findings.title: Resume PDF and photo in working directory
findings.impact: Personal info exposure during local dev only.

findings.title: layout: none should be layout: null in index.html
findings.impact: Works by accident. Future Jekyll versions could break.

findings.title: GitHub Pages custom_404: false despite 404.md
findings.impact: Likely no actual impact.

findings.title: 36KB trading page with 9 hidden detail sections in DOM
findings.impact: Negligible on modern browsers.

findings.title: Unescaped ampersand in P&L table header
findings.impact: No visible impact. Standards compliance only.

findings.title: Inline scripts/styles incompatible with strict CSP
findings.impact: No current impact. GitHub Pages doesn't enforce CSP.
